description: Detects timing attacks and weak cryptography in JavaScript/TypeScript: string comparison on tokens/secrets (=== instead of constant-time compare), Math.random() for security values, createHash with MD5/SHA1, createCipheriv with ECB mode. Simplified from Rust: flags all member expression call_expressions (cannot filter to only Math.random/createHash/createCipheriv or check variable names without #match? predicate support). All method calls flagged.

flag.message: Member expression call detected -- verify no Math.random() for security tokens, no createHash('md5'/'sha1'), and no createCipheriv with ECB mode
